evidence_paragraphs.snippet: Prince [Doran](wiki:Doran_Martell) has been at the [Water Gardens](wiki:Water_Gardens) for nearly two years now, watching the children play in the pools while trying to deal with his gout. Captain...

The next morning, the prince and his retinue begin the journey back to Sunspear, but along the way they come upon another of the Sand Snakes. The beautiful [Lady Nym](wiki:Nymeria_Sand) is far more...

Shortly after, Prince Doran commands the captain to round up and confine all the Sand Snakes, including [Ellaria's](wiki:Ellaria_Sand) young daughters. Obara, Nymeria and Tyene are locked up in cells...
